x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Now Assist for TPRM enables AI-powered assessment summarization, vendor risk analysis, and issue generation recommendations. Without this plugin, risk teams cannot leverage generative AI to accelerate third-party assessments and reduce manual review effort.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Install Now Assist for TPRM from the ServiceNow Store.
